column1: # Sweep 16 on AGX showed monotonic descent through 0.034 (1.9782) — peak not found.
# This fine bracket starts at 0.034 (anchor) and probes 0.036–0.046 with 0.002 steps.
# If curve turns up before 0.046, we have the peak. If still descending, extend further.
# All runs use full locked config: QK=5.5 WD=0.64 TTT+sliding EMA=0.995 SOFTCAP=20
